readCarefully: Please read these terms carefully before using the Health Portal management system.
contactCounsel: For privacy requests or legal inquiries, please contact our counsel:

content.introText1: The Health Portal platform is an enterprise-grade healthcare management suite. By accessing our services, you enter into a binding agreement with Health Portal ("we", "us", "our").
content.introText2: These Terms govern your use of our digital dashboards, API services, and management tools. They apply to all healthcare facilities, administrative staff, and medical professionals authorized to operate on the platform.
content.defPlatformText: The digital environment including Reception, Manager, and Owner dashboards.
content.defPatientDataText: Personal health information, medical records, and PII processed by the system.
content.eligibilityText: Access is strictly limited to authorized personnel of registered hospitals. You must be at least 18 years old and represent a legitimate healthcare entity.
content.securityNoticeText: Impersonating medical staff or accessing patient data without authorization is a violation of these terms and may lead to criminal prosecution.
content.privacyText: Health Portal serves as a Processor. The Hospital acts as the Controller. We implement industry-standard encryption (TLS 1.3), rigorous audit logging, and automated PII masking.
